news.t: Bitcoin's high conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
The first-ever 3x levered bitcoin funds are launching in Europe next week. The timing couldn't be worse.
Firms launch options on swap-based Bitcoin ETF
Options Market Now Open for Latest T-REX 2X/-2X Bitcoin Daily Target ETFs
REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management Launch 2X Leveraged and Inverse Spot Bitcoin ETPs

overview.description: The T-Rex 2X Long Bitcoin Daily Target ETF (BTCL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of spot Bitcoin, less fees, and expenses.  The fund uses over-the-counter swaps to pursue its objective. BTCL was launched on Jul 10, 2024 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: Bitcoin's high conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
data.text: In the past two days, bitcoin's highest conviction holders have sold about $2.4 billion in bitcoin. Of the bitcoin sold in the past 30 days, 26% came from investors who bought it above $90,000.

data.title: The first-ever 3x levered bitcoin funds are launching in Europe next week. The timing couldn't be worse.
data.text: Leveraged ETFs bring even more risk to volatile assets like crypto.

data.title: Firms launch options on swap-based Bitcoin ETF
data.text: Options on just-launched leveraged products that track the spot price of bitcoin via derivative swaps began trading on Thursday, a first for the cryptocurrency exchange-traded fund (ETF) universe.
